title: PINNs on cardiac geometry (Delta-PINN)
expected_band: the Delta-PINN (Laplace-Beltrami eigenbasis input) reconstructs the surface activation more accurately than a vanilla (x, y, z) PINN under the same intrinsic Eikonal residual, and than a smoothness-only 3D interpolation baseline, on the curved geometry

ladder.classical: 3D interpolation of sparse LATs over the surface (ignores the manifold and the physics)
ladder.sota: physics-informed activation on the surface with the intrinsic Eikonal residual
ladder.novel: Delta-PINN: Laplace-Beltrami eigenfunction input encoding so the PINN respects the true geometry (Sahli Costabal et al. 2024)

engine.model: Delta-PINN vs vanilla PINN on a curved surface; intrinsic per-face Eikonal residual; geodesic ground truth

reasons: not web-drivable (input is not a browser-suppliable coordinate/parameter)

references.cite: Sahli Costabal, Pezzuto, Perdikaris (2024). Delta-PINNs: physics-informed neural networks on complex geometries. Engineering Applications of AI 127
references.note: the eigenfunction positional encoding reproduced here

references.cite: Crane, Weischedel, Wardetzky (2013). Geodesics in heat. ACM TOG 32(5)
